name: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Garlic-Miso Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 pound assorted vegetables (such as broccoli, green beans, eggplant, mushrooms, bell pepper and bean sprouts), cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large skillet over high heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté until golden, about 2 minutes.
3. Add yellow miso, oyster sauce, and sugar; stir to blend.
4. Add vegetables and jalapeño; sauté until vegetables are crisp-tender, about 12 minutes.
5. Serve immediately.
